Advanced Neuromodulation

Revolutionize Your
Mental Wellness.

Discover FDA-approved, non-invasive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS). A groundbreaking approach to treating depression, anxiety, and complex cognitive conditions without systemic side effects.

Advanced Capabilities

Pioneering Mental Health Care

We leverage state-of-the-art neuro-technologies alongside proven psychiatric methods to deliver unparalleled outcomes.

Core Treatment

Psychiatry TMS

FDA-approved, highly targeted magnetic pulses to alleviate severe depression and anxiety.
Neuromodulation

Neurology TMS

Cutting-edge brain stimulation techniques designed specifically for neurological recovery.
Fast-Acting

Spravato Therapy

Esketamine nasal spray for rapid intervention in treatment-resistant cases.
Infusion Therapy

Ketamine Infusions

Clinically monitored IV therapy providing profound relief for severe mood disorders.
Precision Targeting

Conditions We Treat

Our neuromodulation methods are highly effective across a wide spectrum of complex psychiatric and neurological disorders.

Treatment-Resistant Depression

When traditional antidepressants fail, TMS provides a proven pathway to remission by targeting underactive brain regions.

Learn More

Severe Anxiety & PTSD

Calm overactive neural pathways associated with generalized anxiety, panic disorder, and severe trauma.

Learn More

Obsessions & Compulsions (OCD)

FDA-cleared deep TMS protocols to disrupt compulsive behavioral loops and radically restore cognitive control.

Learn More

Cognitive Decline & Alzheimer's

Neuromodulation approaches designed to powerfully stimulate memory centers and support structural neuroplasticity.

Learn More

Traumatic Brain Injury (TBI)

Accelerate functional recovery from post-concussive syndrome by enhancing targeted neuronal firing.

Learn More

Neuropathic Pain & Migraines

Non-pharmacological relief for debilitating chronic pain syndromes by modulating deep sensory processing networks.

Learn More

A Higher Standard of Mental Healthcare

Combining cutting-edge treatments with deep compassion to help you regain your quality of life.

01

Board Certified

State-of-the-Art Neuromodulation Facility
The Clinic Experience

Designed for Your Comfort and Recovery

We believe that advanced neurotechnology should be delivered in an environment that feels luxurious, relaxing, and entirely centered around your healing.

Our clinic features the latest FDA-approved TMS devices capable of delivering precise, highly-targeted magnetic pulses while you recline comfortably. You can read, listen to music, or simply rest during your 20-minute sessions.

Latest TMS Tech
Spa-like Environment
Private Suites
Dedicated Care Team
Schedule a Tour
Innovation in Mental Health

A science-backed approach to
restoring mental clarity.

Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) is an FDA-approved, non-invasive treatment that uses gentle magnetic pulses to reactivate brain pathways regulating mood.

Non-Invasive Treatment

No surgery, no anesthesia, and no downtime. You can drive yourself to and from every session.

FDA-Approved & Safe

Proven reliable and safe for treating depression and OCD, with high efficacy rates for resistant cases.

No Systemic Side Effects

Avoids common medication issues like weight gain, drowsiness, or sexual dysfunction.

Quick & Efficacious

Sessions take just 20-30 minutes, fitting easily into your daily schedule.

Book Your Consultation
Process

Your Path to Wellness

A transparent, straightforward protocol designed to perfectamente map to your neurological needs.

01

Consultation

An in-depth review of your psychiatric history, symptoms, and previous treatments to determine if TMS is the right fit.

02

Brain Mapping

A precise clinical evaluation to discover your unique motor threshold and pinpoint the exact treatment location.

03

TMS Sessions

Relax in our advanced chairs for 20 minutes a day over 4-6 weeks while the magnetic pulses do their work.

04

Recovery

Experience a lifting of the "cloud" and measurable improvements in mood, clarity, sleep, and energy.

Success Stories

Real Results from Real Patients

Hear directly from those who have regained control of their lives through our personalized neuromodulation therapies.

Watch Mark's Journey

"After years of trying different medications with profound side effects, TMS with Dr. Amin fundamentally changed my life. Within weeks, the heavy cloud lifted completely."

SM

Sarah M.

Depression Recovery

"I was skeptical initially, but the results speak for themselves. The intrusive thoughts have properly faded into the background for the first time in what feels like forever."

DK

David K.

OCD Treatment

Take the First Step Toward Better Mental Health

You don't have to navigate this journey alone. Dr. Amin and our dedicated team are here to help you regain your life.

Book Your Consultation Today
Dr. Ritesh Amin Psychiatry & TMS

Providing advanced, compassionate care and innovative TMS therapy for individuals in New Jersey seeking profound mental wellness.

Emergency: If you are experiencing a medical crisis, call 911 or visit the nearest emergency room.
